name: tags_create
description: Create a new tag or apply an existing tag to contacts, companies, or conversations.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Tag name. Creates new tag if it does not exist.

parameters.name: users
parameters.description: Array of user objects to tag: [{id: 'contact-id'}] or [{email: 'user@email.com'}].

parameters.name: companies
parameters.description: Array of company objects to tag: [{id: 'company-id'}].
